Container.Name: PSFree
Container.Overview:
PSFree is a lightweight local HTTP server for hosting the PSFree exploit
Best practice: • Run with br0 network mode and its own dedicated IP address • Set the Web UI port below to 80
This allows simple redirects without a reverse proxy.
Redirecting manuals.playstation.net: • AdGuard Home / Pi-hole: DNS rewrite → container IP • Firewalls (pfSense / OPNsense): DNS override
Then, on PS4, open User Guide and the exploit loads automatically.

Config.Name: PORT Override
Config.Description: HTTP port exposed by container (sets PORT env)
